/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc -g -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=13.5 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/configurator.dir/configurator.c.o -o configurator
